testsuite.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product

testcase.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Printers

testcase.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Options
testcase.classname: should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Options

testcase.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product should open website on a specific accessories PDP to check tabs
testcase.classname: should open website on a specific accessories PDP to check tabs
